Elan Ripstick 96 strongly matches on: edge_grip. Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "At 96mm they're right in the sweet spot" Review: "carbon Amphibio construction is unique — different flex on each edge for easier turn initiation" Review: "Good edge grip"
